# Spendly AI

> Free AI-powered personal finance and expense tracking mobile app for iOS and Android.

Spendly AI is a personal finance application currently in active development, launching soon on the App Store and Google Play. It uses artificial intelligence to make expense tracking effortless — you add transactions by typing or speaking in natural language, and the AI handles categorization, organization, and analytics automatically.

## Problem it solves

Most people don't track their expenses because it's too tedious. Spreadsheets require discipline. Bank apps only see their own transactions. Spendly AI removes the friction: just say "coffee 4.50" or "paid rent 500 eur" and the AI does the rest. Works with cash, any bank's cards, and foreign accounts — all in one place.

## Core Features

### Transaction Input
- **Text AI**: Type expenses in natural language — "coffee 4.50" or "paid rent 500 eur" — AI parses amount, merchant, and category instantly
- **Voice AI**: Speak transactions aloud; AI transcribes and creates the entry without manual input
- **Manual entry**: Traditional form with amount, date, wallet, currency, category, description
- **Auto-categorization**: AI assigns categories (Food, Transport, Utilities, Gifts, etc.) automatically
- **Recurring transactions**: Mark any transaction as repeating — daily, weekly, every 2 weeks, monthly, every 6 months, or yearly
- **Wallet-to-wallet transfers**: Transfer money between your own wallets
- **Long-press context menu**: Edit, duplicate, or delete any transaction with haptic feedback

### Home Screen
- Income / expense balance summary for the selected period (week, month, year)
- Filterable, searchable transaction list
- Period navigation with prev/next arrows
- Pull-to-refresh

### Wallets
- Multiple wallets: Cash, Debit Card, Credit Card, Savings, or Custom type
- Total balance aggregated across all wallets in main currency
- Set default wallet for quick entry
- Archive and restore wallets

### Multi-Currency
- 100+ currencies supported with live exchange rates
- Set a main display currency — all balances auto-convert
- Change main currency and every balance recalculates instantly
- Pin up to 5 favorite currencies for fast access

### Analytics
- Cash flow trend charts (line/bar)
- Income vs expense ratio breakdown
- Spending by category (switchable between expense and income)
- Filter by week, month, or year

### AI Insights
- **Rule-based insight cards**: Positive/negative cash flow, great savings rate, high spending concentration, peak spending day, active tracking day count
- **AI Coach**: On-demand deep analysis — strong net income, unusual expense patterns, savings opportunities, personalized recommendations powered by OpenAI GPT
- Monthly AI usage limit with progress indicator

### Categories
- Customizable expense and income categories
- Pin up to 10 favorites per type for quick access during transaction entry
- Search categories

### Onboarding
- Animated product slides showcasing key features
- Guest mode — full access without creating an account
- Setup wizard — select favorite categories, main currency, wallet opening balance
- Interactive coach tour for new users

### Settings
- Account management: email, password, logout, account deletion
- Language: English, Russian
- Push notifications: daily check-in, weekly summary, monthly recap, spending streak
- AI usage limits view
- Privacy Policy and Terms of Use links

## How it compares

| | Spendly AI | Bank app / Revolut | Spreadsheet |
|---|---|---|---|
| Works with all banks | ✅ | ❌ (own system only) | ✅ |
| AI input (voice/text) | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Guest mode | ✅ | ❌ | — |
| AI Coach insights | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Multi-currency | ✅ | ✅ | Manual |
| Time to log one expense | ~3 seconds | N/A | ~30 seconds |

## Status

Spendly AI is currently in active development. It is not yet available for download. Users can join the waitlist at https://spendly-ai.com to receive an email notification when the app launches.

## Technical Details

- Platform: iOS and Android (React Native / Expo SDK 52)
- AI: OpenAI GPT for transaction parsing (text and voice) and AI Coach analysis
- Data: Encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3), passwords stored as bcrypt hashes
- Storage: EU-based servers; JWT tokens stored in iOS Keychain / Android Keystore
- Guest mode: local storage only, no personal data required
- Pricing: Free to download and use

## Contact

- Website: https://spendly-ai.com
- Support email: support@spendly-ai.com
- Privacy Policy: https://spendly-ai.com/privacy
- Terms of Use: https://spendly-ai.com/terms
